base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_wave_beam — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1986 metroid. Wave Beam — 4-frame sine-wave projectile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wave Beam — 4-frame sine-wave projectile; passes through walls; acquired as beam-upgrade
